name: @tokagent/plugin-a2a-client
description: Call other agents via Google's A2A protocol, paying with x402 vouchers when required. Discovers AgentCards at /.well-known/agent.json, invokes JSON-RPC tasks, and handles the HTTP 402 challenge-response loop transparently using EIP-3009 PTON authorizations signed by the operator wallet.

X402_FACILITATOR_URL.description: Optional URL of an x402 facilitator that verifies payment vouchers on-chain before the upstream service trusts them. If unset, we send the signed EIP-3009 voucher directly via X-Payment and trust the 2xx response from the upstream service. Most users leave this unset; the gateway/server handles verification.

X402_MAX_PAYMENT_PER_CALL_PTON.description: Hard cap on any single x402 payment. The middleware refuses to sign vouchers above this amount and surfaces a clear error showing both the requested amount and the cap. Default: 1.0 PTON. Increase via .env if you call expensive paid agents.

X402_MAX_TOTAL_SPEND_PTON.description: Session-wide spend cap. When cumulative x402 payments exceed this, subsequent 402 challenges emit X402_SESSION_CAP_HIT and are refused until the agent restarts or the cap is raised. Default: 10.0 PTON.

A2A_REGISTRY_URL.description: Optional cache of known AgentCards by ID. Falls back to direct GET /.well-known/agent.json fetch when unset. No registry is required for v0.1.
